description: After reuniting on Zephyr One, Elena realizes that the key to her powers was letting go of her guilt—she moves without 'bouncing back,' successfully passing through the time drive field and stabilizing the ship. The team expresses relief and gratitude. There is hope for the mission, though they are all exhausted from the ordeal.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Wait, you... you didn't bounce back. How'd you do that?
I think I've always been able to. I was just holding myself back.
Afterlife was the right call, then. I'm glad it worked out.
Your new body still hasn't fully charged, so you'll need to power down for a few hours. Think of it like a nap.
Sure it is. At least let me.
